Vendor setup · Intelligence

Set up Anthropic (Claude)

Anthropic's Claude models shape your transcript into your template with strong clinical-note quality. Before you rely on it for patient-derived text, read the privacy note below carefully.

Intelligence (note-shaping) BAA — small-customer status being verified ~CAD $2–8/mo at ~440 notes

Role in DirectScribe
Intelligence — molds the transcript into your note template.
Where the text goes
The transcript text is sent to Anthropic over an encrypted (TLS) connection.
Privacy paperwork
Availability of a BAA at individual/small scale is unverified — see below.
Typical cost
See the cost breakdown.

Create your API key

  1. Create an Anthropic account

    Sign up at console.anthropic.com and add a payment method under Billing.

  2. Create an API key

    Open API Keys, click Create Key, name it DirectScribe, and copy it. The value is shown once.

  3. Paste it into DirectScribe

    Open Settings → Providers → Intelligence, choose Anthropic, and paste the key. It is saved to your macOS Keychain.

Privacy paperwork

BAA — status being verified, treat as conditional

We have not yet confirmed whether Anthropic offers a Business Associate Agreement to individual or small-clinic customers. Do not assume one is available. If your privacy assessment requires a signed vendor agreement before sending any patient-derived text, use OpenAI (BAA by email to individuals) or run note-shaping locally with LM Studio until Anthropic's small-customer terms are confirmed. Verify current terms directly with Anthropic.

Not legal advice — see the Compliance Centre. This page is kept deliberately conditional and will be updated when the terms are confirmed.

Contact us Use OpenAI instead
